title: Source Response Cache Entry
description: One file per cached URL at interview_questions_knowledge/sources_cache/<sha256(url)>.json. Loop 1 and Loop 6 check this cache before issuing a new fetch. TTL per domain is defined in policies/source_ttl.json.

fetched_at.description: ISO-8601. TTL is computed against this.

ttl_days.description: Effective TTL applied at fetch time (copied from source_ttl.json).

expires_at.description: fetched_at + ttl_days. Cache hit only if now < expires_at.

fetch_status.description: Result classification. Non-ok statuses still cache to avoid retry storms; FAILURE HANDLING in AGENT.md applies.

content_excerpts.description: Extracted question-relevant excerpts. Full HTML is NOT stored. Each excerpt is the raw evidence Loop 4 can re-validate against.

selector.description: CSS/XPath selector or section header to locate this excerpt on re-fetch.

outbound_links.description: Links found on the page that the source 'cites'. Used to populate Evidence.cites for the citation-cycle dedup.

rate_limit_remaining.description: Domain-level rate limit budget remaining at fetch time.
